headline: Eaton Taps Insider CFO As Portfolio Shift And Mobility Spin Off Progress
summary: Eaton (NYSE:ETN) has appointed long-serving executive David Foster as its new Chief Financial Officer. Foster will succeed outgoing CFO Olivier Leonetti as part of a planned executive transition. The change comes as Eaton works through a planned spin off and ongoing integration efforts across the business. Eaton, trading at $354.79, has seen its share price rise 29.5% over the past year and 177.3% over the past five years. The stock is also up 8.4% year to date, even with a 5.3% decline...

headline: Eaton (ETN) Appoints David Foster as EVP and CFO Following 2025 Financial Results
summary: Eaton Corporation (NYSE:ETN) is one of the stocks that should double in 3 years. On March 2, Eaton named David Foster as its new executive vice president and chief financial officer. Foster rejoins the intelligent power management company following a 29-year career with the organization, which previously concluded with his retirement in 2022. He succeeds […]
